_comment: 20 hooks for clip_007 — round-robin slice of the 144-hook library from clip_001.

hooks._note: 4-segment: 3 things most guys don't notice about me

hooks._note: 4-segment: 3 gross things i do as a gym girl

segments.text:
3 gross things i do
as a gym girl

1. sit in my sweaty clothes
after the gym

2. don't wipe the seat
after leg press

3. don't put on deodorant
before going to the gym
